title: Explain pointers in C
content: What are pointers in C? How do you declare and use them? Provide examples of pointer arithmetic.

title: What is dynamic memory allocation?
content: Explain malloc(), calloc(), realloc(), and free() functions. When and how should they be used?

title: Difference between array and pointer
content: What are the similarities and differences between arrays and pointers in C?

title: Explain function pointers
content: What are function pointers in C? How do you declare and use them? Provide practical examples.

title: What are storage classes in C?
content: Explain different storage classes in C: auto, register, static, and extern. Provide examples.

title: What is C Programming?
content: Explain the key features of the C language. Why is it called a middle-level language?

title: Difference between Compiler and Interpreter
content: Explain the difference between compiler and interpreter with examples.

title: Write a program to find factorial of a number
content: Write a C program to calculate the factorial of a number.

title: Write a program to reverse a string without using strrev()
content: Write a C program to reverse a string without using the strrev() function.

title: Call by value vs call by reference
content: Explain with examples how functions can be called by value and reference.

title: Write a program to check prime number
content: Write a C program to check whether a number is prime or not.

title: Explain Dynamic Memory Allocation in C
content: What are malloc(), calloc(), realloc(), and free()? Explain with syntax.

title: Swap two numbers without third variable
content: Write a C program to swap two numbers without using a third variable.

title: Write a program for Fibonacci series
content: Write a C program to print Fibonacci series up to n terms.

title: Explain Structures vs Unions
content: What are structures and unions in C? How do they differ in memory allocation?

title: Sum of array elements
content: Write a C program to calculate the sum of all elements in an array.

title: What is Recursion?
content: Explain recursion in C with example program (factorial, Fibonacci).

title: Find largest number in an array
content: Write a C program to find the largest number in an array.

title: Explain File Handling in C
content: What are fopen(), fclose(), fprintf(), fscanf()? Explain with an example.

title: Check palindrome string
content: Write a C program to check whether a string is palindrome or not.

title: Difference between gets() and fgets()
content: Explain why gets() is unsafe and why fgets() should be preferred.

title: Implement Bubble Sort
content: Write a C program to sort elements using Bubble Sort algorithm.

title: Explain Preprocessor Directives
content: What are #include, #define, #ifdef, #ifndef? Explain with examples.
